pageContext.name: Ultramarines Primaris Reivers
pageContext.description: 'We are the Ultramarines, the sons of Guilliman. Whilst we draw breath, we stand. Whilst we stand, we fight. Whilst we fight, we prevail. Nothing shall stay our wrath.'  — Marneus Calgar, Chapter Master of the Ultramarines  Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to bring you the Ultramarines Primaris Reivers Collectible Set!  Considered the strongest and most honored of the Space Marine Chapters in the Imperium of Man, these celebrated Ultramarines are brought to life in 1:18 scale for fans of the acclaimed war game, Warhammer 40K. Wearing skull-faced helmets, the Reiver squad specializes in guerilla warfare as a reconnaissance and special operations unit. Taking assaults to the next level, these Ultramarines come equipped with an array of weapons for silent and effective close-combat warfare.  Warhammer 40k fans, be sure to add the Reivers to your team today!
